description.ko: 자정의 빗줄기를 뚫고 네온 불빛이 빛나는 미래 대도시의 숨막히는 전경으로, 하이테크 도시 경관의 활기찬 에너지를 보여줍니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic metropolis where neon lights pierce through the midnight rain, showcasing the vibrant energy of a high-tech urban landscape.

prompt: Hyper-realistic cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain, glowing neon signs in electric blue and hot pink, soaring skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through towers, wet asphalt reflecting vibrant lights, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, NEON-V aesthetic.
